summary: Environment & Config Hardening Testing Complete. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified for all 3 roles (director, coach, athlete). Security headers present on all responses, CORS correctly configured, no hardcoded URLs found, config logging working at startup.
critical_code_review_comments: config.py correctly centralizes all environment-based settings with fail-fast in production
SecurityHeadersMiddleware adds all required security headers (HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, CSP)
CORS correctly configured using ALLOWED_ORIGINS from config - allows FRONTEND_URL and localhost in dev, rejects unauthorized origins
No hardcoded preview/production URLs found in backend Python files (excluding tests and comments)
Config logging at startup shows all key settings (APP_ENV, FRONTEND_URL, ALLOWED_ORIGINS, ENABLE_HTTPS_REDIRECT, ENABLE_SECURITY_HEADERS)
Rate limiting middleware working correctly (10 requests/minute on login endpoint)
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data - no new seed data created
context_for_next_testing_agent: Environment & Config Hardening testing complete (iteration 240). All 16 backend tests passed verifying: (1) POST /api/auth/login - all 3 roles working (athlete, director, coach), (2) GET /api/mission-control - returns correct data for each role, (3) Security headers present on all responses (Strict-Transport-Security, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Content-Security-Policy), (4) CORS allows FRONTEND_URL origin and localhost in dev, (5) CORS rejects unauthorized origins (evil.com), (6) No hardcoded URLs in backend Python files, (7) Config logging at startup shows all key settings. Frontend verified: Director dashboard shows 11 athletes, Coach dashboard shows 5 athletes, Athlete login works (rate limited after multiple requests - working as expected). Rate limiting middleware working correctly.
